pathAssistantSteps.info:
• Verify the Company name is accurate and matches the dealer’s official business registration.
  • Confirm the CIN is a valid 21-character code issued by the Registrar of Companies in India.
  • Ensure the Dealer Type field is correctly selected.

• Record the Reason for not converting the lead clearly and accurately.
  • Capture any Dealer feedback or obstacles that prevented conversion.
  • Share insights with the team to refine future lead qualification efforts.
  • Ensure the lead is properly closed or recycled for future engagement if applicable.

• Verify the Lead’s Name, Mobile, and Email are correct and complete.
  • Confirm the Product Category Interest is accurately captured.
  • Ensure all essential contact information is documented for follow-up.
